name: 4 Meals in 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a double batch of spaghetti sauce using ground beef.
2. Add a large, pre-browned pot roast to the cooking sauce until the roast is done. Wrap in foil and allow to cool.
3. Remove a portion of the meat sauce and add a can of chili beans. Freeze for chili.
4. Remove another portion of the sauce and freeze for sloppy joes.
5. The remaining sauce should be served with spaghetti.
